Ignoring dependence pragma on local scalar variable 're'.
Loop 'VITIS_LOOP_95_1' is marked as complete unroll implied by the pipeline pragma
Unrolling loop 'VITIS_LOOP_95_1' (serial_fft/fft_serial.cpp:95:22) in function 'fft_serial' completely with a factor of 10
Applying array_partition to 're': Cyclic partitioning with factor 2 on dimension 1.
Applying array_partition to 'im': Cyclic partitioning with factor 2 on dimension 1.
